title: Passenger Attendants
description: Provide services to ensure the safety of passengers aboard ships, buses, trains, or within the station or terminal. Perform duties such as explaining the use of safety equipment, serving meals or beverages, or answering questions related to travel.

tasks.text: Secure passengers for transportation by buckling seatbelts or fastening wheelchairs with tie-down straps.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide boarding assistance to elderly, sick, or injured people.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Respond to passengers' questions, requests, or complaints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide customers with information on routes, gates, prices, timetables, terminals, or concourses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform equipment safety checks prior to departure.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Greet passengers boarding transportation equipment and announce routes and stops.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Count and verify tickets and seat reservations and record numbers of passengers boarding and disembarking.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Explain and demonstrate safety procedures and safety equipment use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Open and close doors for passengers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Signal transportation operators to stop or to proceed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust window shades or seat cushions at the request of passengers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
